failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT p.id AS profile_id, p.username, p.full_name
FROM profile p
WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'S&a-o & Paulo')
   OR p.username ILIKE '%saopaulo%'
   OR p.full_name ILIKE '%São Paulo%'
ORDER BY p.num_followers DESC
LIMIT 10;

-- The provided schema does not contain information about prices, dishes, or restaurant menus.
-- Per the instructions, I am providing a best-effort query that searches for profiles 
-- related to "São Paulo" to identify relevant accounts that might be associated with restaurants,
-- even though price data itself is unavailable in the database.

SELECT 
    p.id AS profile_id, 
    p.username, 
    p.full_name, 
    p.biography
FROM profile p
WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'sao & paulo')
   OR p.full_name ILIKE '%São Paulo%'
ORDER BY p.num_followers DESC
LIMIT 10;
